objective: Add an explicit strict status option that fails closed unless exactly one current doing pipeline/orchestration task exists and passes orchestration preflight, so green agent rollup cannot be mistaken for launch readiness.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: status supports a current-task readiness gate; focused tests cover missing/current/invalid preflight paths; strict evidence and workflow manifest pass

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
